title: I'm Sourav Shrestha, I live in Bangalore, KA.
paragraphs: I'm a .NET Full Stack Developer with 7+ years of experience who enjoys building things that solve real problems (and occasionally creating new ones while debugging).
I share what I'm building and learning along the way.
If you're into tech, side projects, or just want to 👋 say hi, feel free to reach out.
